profile.name: Mahima Gupta
profile.tagline: Building AI-powered products and full-stack systems that are fast, type-safe, and actually ship.
bio: I'm a second-year Information Technology student at GGSIPU building full-stack products at the intersection of AI and developer tooling. I care about correctness, clean architecture, and shipping things that work in production — not just in demos.

My work spans AI-powered learning platforms, personal finance systems, and productivity apps — all built with Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. I focus on strong data modeling, type-safe pipelines, and UIs that feel fast.

Currently interning as a Web Development Intern at TechTattva and contributing as a Tech Team Member at Namespace Community. Open to internship opportunities where I can go deep on systems and ship real product.

experience.summary: Building and maintaining web interfaces for community tech events. Working in a cross-functional team on feature development, responsive UI components, and bug fixes.
highlights: Developed responsive web interfaces for community tech events using React.js and Tailwind CSS
Collaborated with a cross-functional team on feature development and UI component architecture
Contributed to bug fixes and iterative improvements across the production codebase

experience.summary: Contributing to technical initiatives and community-driven projects within a developer-focused student community. Active in collaborative development workflows and code reviews.
highlights: Contributed to technical initiatives and community-driven developer projects
Participated in collaborative development workflows and team-based problem solving
Engaged in code reviews and cross-team coordination on open projects

projects.title: BrainLoop
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Adaptive Learning Platform
projects.description: An adaptive learning platform that uses Google Gemini API to generate personalized MCQ quizzes targeting concepts below a 70% accuracy threshold. Includes a weak-area detection engine, an interactive AI tutor for real-time follow-up Q&A, and Recharts dashboards for per-topic accuracy and session history.

projects.title: FinSight AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack Personal Finance Platform
projects.description: A personal finance platform with expense and income tracking, dynamic monthly budget management, and real-time category-wise spending analytics. Built with a relational PostgreSQL schema via Prisma, type-safe Zod pipelines, and Clerk auth with Svix webhook handlers for automated user sync.

projects.title: DayFrame
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack Productivity & Goal Management App
projects.description: A productivity platform for task and goal management featuring milestone tracking with dynamic progress bars, deadline scheduling, and priority-based task categorization. Includes a real-time analytics dashboard calculating completion rates and milestone progress from live MongoDB data.
